latest_session.title: 2026-05-24h
latest_session.goal: Refine Convergence Forum slides and remove the MiKTeX compile blocker.
latest_session.outcome: Slide revisions were committed and pushed to Overleaf. MiKTeX was initialized for the normal user, packages were updated, `pdflatex` format was rebuilt, and `helpi 6 AI_auto -Force` produced a fresh 25-page PDF locally under elevated execution. Slide 14 no longer overflows; only an older slide 8 overfull warning remains. Future agents should call `helpi.ps1` by absolute path from tool calls.
latest_session.next_steps: none for slides 13-14. Future Codex local LaTeX verification should run escalated because the sandbox identity cannot use the normal user's MiKTeX setup.
files_touched: `Overleaf_source\slides_division_meeting.tex` -- Replaced "Deliberation" with simpler debate/discussion wording; revised slide 14 to show human input, problem framing, scope/evidence, success criteria, and a compact Forum flow.
`known_issues.md` -- Updated the MiKTeX issue and added the recurring absolute-path requirement for `helpi.ps1` in agent tool calls.
